# railway_service_variables (Data Source)

Read all variables for a Railway service in a given environment. Useful for referencing connection strings and credentials from database or cache services managed outside the current Terraform state.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `environment_id` (String) Identifier of the environment to read variables from.
- `service_id` (String) Identifier of the service to read variables from.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Identifier of the data source.
- `project_id` (String) Identifier of the project the service belongs to.
- `variables` (Map of String, Sensitive) Map of variable names to their values.
